metadata.title: Keyboard Analyzer
metadata.description: See and analyse your keyboard hotkeys and shortcuts

regex.target: .log("正在为元素附加监听器", id, element)
.log(id, "元素在可检测之前已被卸载。")

regex.source: .error("[scroll] Don't know how to add event listeners.")
regex.target: .error("[scroll] 不知道如何添加事件监听器。")

regex.source: .error("[scroll] Don't know how to remove event listeners.")
regex.target: .error("[scroll] 不知道如何移除事件监听器。")

regex.source: .error("Invalid arguments. Must be a DOM element or a collection of DOM elements.")
regex.target: .error("无效参数。必须是一个 DOM 元素或一组 DOM 元素。")
Error('不兼容的接收者,' + TYPE + ' 需要')
Error("无法在 " + it + " 上调用方法")

regex.source: Error("Can't convert object to primitive value")
regex.target: Error("无法将对象转换为原始值")

regex.source: Error("Can't set " + String(proto) + ' as a prototype')
regex.target: Error("无法将 " + String(proto) + ' 设置为原型')

regex.source: Error('`feather.replace()` only works in a browser environment.')
regex.target: Error('`feather.replace()` 只能在浏览器环境中使用。')

regex.source: Error('The required `key` (icon name) parameter is missing.')
regex.target: Error('必需的 `key`（图标名称）参数缺失。')

regex.source: Error('No icon matching \'' + name + '\'. See the complete list of icons at https://feathericons.com')
regex.target: Error('没有匹配的图标 \'' + name + '\'. 请参阅完整图标列表：https://feathericons.com')

regex.source: warn('feather.toSvg() is deprecated. Please use feather.icons[name].toSvg() instead.')
regex.target: warn('feather.toSvg() 已废弃。请改用 feather.icons[name].toSvg()。')
Error('函数在组件初始化外部被调用')

regex.source: Error("setId required the element to have a resize detection state.")
regex.target: Error("setId 需要元素具有大小检测状态。")

regex.source: warn("Invalid options combination. auto=true and async=false is invalid. Setting async=true.")
regex.target: warn("无效的选项组合。auto=true 和 async=false 是无效的。设置 async=true。")

regex.source: Error("Element is not detectable by this strategy.")
regex.target: Error("元素在此策略下不可检测。")

regex.source: warn("An element that is positioned static has style." + property + "=" + value + " which is ignored due to the static positioning. The element will need to be positioned relative, so the style." + property + " will be set to 0. Element: ", element)
regex.target: warn("定位为静态的元素具有 style." + property + "=" + value + "，由于静态定位而被忽略。元素需要定位为相对，因此 style." + property + " 将被设置为 0。元素: ", element)

regex.source: Error("Cannot add listener to an element that is not detectable.")
regex.target: Error("无法为不可检测的元素添加监听器。")

regex.source: debug("Aborting because element has been uninstalled")
regex.target: debug("因元素已被卸载而终止")

regex.source: debug("Aborting expand scroll handler: element has been uninstalled")
regex.target: debug("终止扩展滚动处理器：元素已被卸载")

regex.source: debug("Aborting shrink scroll handler: element has been uninstalled")
regex.target: debug("终止收缩滚动处理器：元素已被卸载")

regex.source: debug("Aborting because element container has not been initialized")
regex.target: debug("因元素容器未初始化而终止")

regex.source: warn(idHandler.get(element), "Scroll: Size changed before updating detector elements.")
regex.target: warn(idHandler.get(element), "滚动：在更新检测器元素之前大小已改变。")

regex.source: debug("Not notifying: Size is the same as the start size, and there has been no notification yet.")
regex.target: debug("不通知：大小与初始大小相同，且尚未发出通知。")
debug("当前大小未通知，正在通知...")

regex.source: debug("Ignoring since element is still unrendered...")
regex.target: debug("忽略：元素仍处于未渲染状态...")

regex.source: debug("Scrollbars out of sync. Updating detector elements...")
regex.target: debug("滚动条不同步。正在更新检测器元素...")

regex.source: debug("Scroll event fired while unrendered. Ignoring...")
regex.target: debug("未渲染状态下触发了滚动事件。忽略...")

regex.source: warn("Scroll strategy is not supported on legacy Opera. Changing to object strategy.")
regex.target: warn("Scroll 策略不支持旧版 Opera。切换到 object 策略。")

regex.source: warn("Scroll strategy is not supported on IE9. Changing to object strategy.")
regex.target: warn("Scroll 策略不支持 IE9。切换到 object 策略。")
'按 Esc 键停用键盘监听器'

regex.source: `Press ${getConvertedModifiers(['Mod'])[0]}+F or long press to activate key listener`
regex.target: `按 ${getConvertedModifiers(['Mod'])[0]}+F 或长按以激活键盘监听器`
